overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female hunter character sprinting through a misty, teal-lit forest at night. The character traverses wooden bridges over streams and explores ancient ruins before stopping to observe the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the narrow forest path between wooden barriers, with a bow equipped on her back

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
flowing water visible through the trees on the right side
massive pine trunks rising into the misty canopy
ground covered in glowing teal moss and ferns

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow forest trail flanked by wooden barriers, with a river visible to the right. The path is covered in luminescent moss and surrounded by dense tall pine trees in the misty teal-lit forest.

events.description: character crosses wooden bridge over the flowing river
entering area with ancient stone ruins and metal structures

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and continuing onto mossy terrain near ancient ruins

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a bridge over the stream
rusted metal barrier attached to stone ruins

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over the river, transitioning from the fenced path to an area with ancient stone ruins. The river shifts from the right to the left side as the character moves through the misty forest toward the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruins clearing with stone platforms

events.description: character stops running and looks up toward the forest canopy

agents.ego_description: halting beside the stone ruins and looking up at the treetops and night sky

entered.detail: large moss-covered concrete structure with metal railing
raised stone platform covered in moss and debris

segments.scene_description: The character slows to a stop beside ancient concrete ruins with metal railings, then looks up at the dark forest canopy. The environment opens up slightly revealing more of the night sky through the dense trees as the character observes the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, teal-lit forest that transitions from a narrow riverside trail into a clearing of ancient ruins. It begins with the character sprinting along a path flanked by wooden barriers and luminescent moss, with a river flowing closely to the right. As the character crosses a wooden bridge, the river shifts to the left side of the frame, guiding the movement away from the fenced trail and toward weathered stone structures. The scene then opens up as the character slows to a stop beside concrete ruins and metal railings, before finally tilting upward to observe the dark forest canopy and the night sky peering through the dense trees.
